Name: Lens Flare
Description: Post-processing optical effect that simulates internal light scattering, diffraction, and lens artifacts caused by bright light sources interacting with a camera lens system. It produces streaks, halos, and ghosting elements based on light position and intensity.

Fields.ID: 光状テクスチャID
Fields.Name: Luminous Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture index used for the primary light flare or glow sprite that represents the core luminous artifact in the lens flare system.

Fields.ID: 許容範囲
Fields.Name: Tolerance Range
Fields.Description: Threshold range that determines how sensitive the lens flare is to light brightness and visibility conditions before activation or attenuation.

Fields.ID: アルファ
Fields.Name: Alpha
Fields.Description: Overall opacity multiplier controlling the visibility and blending strength of the lens flare effect in the final rendered image.

Fields.ID: 位置
Fields.Name: Position
Fields.Description: World or screen-space position of the light source that drives the lens flare effect, determining where flare artifacts originate.

Fields.ID: 角度
Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Directional orientation of flare components, controlling rotation and alignment of streaks or radial artifacts relative to the light source.

Fields.ID: 距離
Fields.Name: Distance
Fields.Description: Distance-based attenuation factor influencing flare intensity and scaling based on camera-to-light separation.

Fields.ID: フレア1-中心時のスクリーンサイズ
Fields.Name: Flare 1: Screen Size at Center
Fields.Description: Screen-space size of the first flare element when positioned near the optical center of the screen or light axis.

Fields.ID: フレア1-外周時のスクリーンサイズ
Fields.Name: Flare 1: Screen Size at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Screen-space size of the first flare element when it shifts toward the screen edge, simulating lens distortion falloff.

Fields.ID: フレア1-中心時の内部色
Fields.Name: Flare 1: Internal Color at Center
Fields.Description: Inner color of the first flare element when positioned at the center, typically representing core glow tint.

Fields.ID: フレア1-中心時の外部色
Fields.Name: Flare 1: External Color at Center
Fields.Description: Outer gradient color of the first flare element at center position, used for halo or fringe coloration.

Fields.ID: フレア1-外周時の内部色
Fields.Name: Flare 1: Internal Color at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Inner color of the first flare element when shifted toward screen edges, allowing chromatic variation under distortion.

Fields.ID: フレア1-外周時の外部色
Fields.Name: Flare 1: External Color at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Outer color of the first flare element at edge positions, used to simulate lens aberration and falloff tinting.

Fields.ID: フレア2-中心時のスクリーンサイズ
Fields.Name: Flare 2: Screen Size at Center
Fields.Description: Screen-space size of the second flare element when aligned near the optical center of the lens system.

Fields.ID: フレア2-外周時のスクリーンサイズ
Fields.Name: Flare 2: Screen Size at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Screen-space size of the second flare element when positioned toward the outer screen boundary, simulating lens falloff.

Fields.ID: フレア2-中心時の内部色
Fields.Name: Flare 2: Internal Color at Center
Fields.Description: Inner core color of the second flare element at center alignment, defining primary glow tone.

Fields.ID: フレア2-中心時の外部色
Fields.Name: Flare 2: External Color at Center
Fields.Description: Outer gradient color of the second flare element at center position, used for halo blending and bloom transition.

Fields.ID: フレア2-外周時の内部色
Fields.Name: Flare 2: Internal Color at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Inner color of the second flare element at edge positions, simulating chromatic shift and lens distortion effects.

Fields.ID: フレア2-外周時の外部色
Fields.Name: Flare 2: External Color at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Outer color of the second flare element at screen edges, controlling peripheral color fading and optical artifacts.

Fields.ID: 光状-中心時のスクリーンサイズ
Fields.Name: Light Shape: Screen Size
Fields.Description: Base screen-space size of the central light shape used in the lens flare core representation.

Fields.ID: 光状-外周時のスクリーンサイズ
Fields.Name: Light Shape: Screen Size at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Screen-space size of the light shape when influenced by edge distortion or off-center positioning.

Fields.ID: 光状-中心時の内部色
Fields.Name: Light Shape: Internal Color at Center
Fields.Description: Inner color of the central light shape defining the core glow intensity and tint.

Fields.ID: 光状-中心時の外部色
Fields.Name: Light Shape: External Color at Center
Fields.Description: Outer color gradient of the central light shape used for halo blending and soft edge transition.

Fields.ID: 光状-外周時の内部色
Fields.Name: Light Shape: Internal Color at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Inner color of the light shape when affected by edge distortion, simulating optical falloff variation.

Fields.ID: 光状-外周時の外部色
Fields.Name: Light Shape: External Color at Outer Edge
Fields.Description: Outer color of the light shape at screen edges, used to simulate chromatic aberration and peripheral fading.
